start: ^"Hey there, fellow adult! I'll just get one brew please! heheh..."

c-0: ^"What? Old enough to command a spaceship, obviously.."
^"What, you want a form of ID? Fine. Feast your Earth-eyes on my Galactic Adult License."
^"As you can see It's laminated.. which makes is VERY official.."
^"Regardless, I need a nice, grounded yet elevated brew."
^"I'm wanting to feel a little 'down to Earth' between the two of us. Hehe..see what I did there?"
^"And don't forget to top if off with a a mini umbrella!"
c-1: ^"THIS IS INTERGALACTIC AGE-ISM, EARTHLING! PREPARE TO BE ZOINKED!"
^"I'd like a nice, grounding yet elevating brew.."
^"I'm wanting to feel a little more 'down to Earth' between the two of us. Hehe... see what I did there?"
^"And don't forget to top if off with a a mini umbrella!"

neutral: ^"Huh... this drink doesn't fully capture my senses.. it's okay,  I guess."
^"Don't feel bad, even capturing Earthlings is easier than capturing the right balance of taste."
satisfied: ^"ZOINKS! This is amazing... this is the good stuff!"
^"I definitely feel a bit more 'down to earth'. Way to go!"
angry: ^"WHAT IN THE MILKY WAY DID YOU BREW ME?!"
^"THIS TASTES LIKE THOSE CARBON POLLUTANTS YOU EARTHLINGS LOVE TO DISPEL!!"

start: ^"WAZZZZ good, my Earthling! Hopefully your day is as zorp-tastic as mine!"

s: ^"What are you in the mood for?"

c-0: ^"My species ages differently. Very differently. In fact, I'm, like... ancient."
^"in my early 20 billions to be exact!"

^"With an umbrella on top of my potion?"
^"Something to blast my zorp-mind into full levitation!"

^"With an umbrella on top of my potion?"

neutral: ^"Huh... this drink doesn't quite capture what I'm looking for."

satisfied: ^"ZOINKS! This gives me the zoomies I needed!"
^"I feel like I'm levitating on a dreamlike planet!"

angry: ^"WHAT IN THE MILKY WAY IS THIS?! THIS TASTES LIKE SPACE JUNK!!!"

start: ^"I am officially DONE being 'down to Earth.'"

^"I'd like a brew that is FAR more elevating."
^"Like I'm operating a spacecraft once again..."

^"I YEARN for orbit, Magetender. YEARN FOR IT!! BZZOOHHHH!"
^"I'd like a brew that is FAR more elevating."
^"Like I'm operating a spacecraft once again..."
